feedback_files.tests/test_feedback.py:
from decimal import Decimal

from billing.allocation import allocate
from billing.money import minor_unit, round_minor


def test_money_uses_settlement_precision_for_three_decimal_currency():
    assert minor_unit("KWD") == Decimal("0.001")
    assert round_minor(Decimal("1.2344"), "KWD") == Decimal("1.234")


def test_allocation_conserves_a_small_total_with_stable_residual_order():
    shares = allocate(Decimal("0.05"), [1, 1], "USD")
    assert shares == [Decimal("0.03"), Decimal("0.02")]
    assert sum(shares) == Decimal("0.05")
